scripts.ci:all: npm -w packages/frontend run ci:check && npm -w packages/backend run lint:check && npm -w packages/backend run build
scripts.test:all: npm -w packages/frontend test && npm -w packages/backend test
scripts.lint:all: npm -w packages/frontend run lint && npm -w packages/backend run lint:check
scripts.typecheck:all: npm -w packages/frontend run typecheck && npm -w packages/backend run build
